mapper.insert: insert into sb_work_group (group_id, customer_id, group_name, group_key, order_num, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{groupId}, #{customerId}, #{groupName}, #{groupKey}, #{orderNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.select: select group_id, customer_id, group_name, group_key, order_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, delete_by, delete_time from sb_work_group where customer_id = #{customerId} and delete_time is null order by order_num, create_time

select group_id, customer_id, group_name, group_key, order_num, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, delete_by, delete_time from sb_work_group where group_id = #{groupId} and delete_time is null
mapper.update: update sb_work_group set delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = sysdate() where group_id = #{groupId}
